title: Templates for Webster Development
excerpt:
Hi. New in Monday community here! 
Is there a way I can use a template for website development so i could better track it’s progress as a project manager? I hope anyone can share their boards as template. Thank you!

posts.author: DeSa (DeSa)
posts.cookedHtml:
